title: Add static search query fixtures
goal: Bind representative static search query fixtures for repair, open data, Hamburg, mutual aid and exact venue lookup.

acceptance.assertion: Representative static search query fixtures validate expected top IDs and scores.
Validator checks reason fields and JS model drift.
No search endpoint/service/database/crawler/submissions/write path or search authority is introduced.

validated_acceptance.query-fixtures: Representative static search query fixtures validate expected top IDs and scores.
validated_acceptance.js-drift: Validator checks reason fields and JS model drift.
validated_acceptance.no-authority: No search endpoint/service/database/crawler/submissions/write path or search authority is introduced.

validation: make validate plus static search query fixture checks
PR body records the no-runtime/no-authority boundary.
